raw_input:
[4.0/5] NOT REALLY WHAT I NEEDED 🙁 Pretty and compact, but difficult to open to access the contents. I love the design and color. But not happy for using it. [5.0/5] Super Unique & Convenient Little Bag I have no idea why anyone would give this product a low rating. I find this product quite useful and very unique. I'm telling you, it is super handy to have. On the inside, there are mesh pockets on either side so you can be super organized and find your things with ease! No more digging around and finding every other item in your bag except the one your digging for. I love the little handle it has. It's so easy to grab this bag and be on your way! I also, love that it doesn't look like every other little bag you may find. I love the material it is made of and the little logo on the front couldn't be any cuter! With this bag, I am able to keep my on the go items such as my makeup, feminine items, as well as, some of the things I may need for my daughter on go. I am very satisfied with this bag. Overall all, I would say this is one super convenient, uniquely cute little bag and I am glad to have been able to purchase it! [5.0/5] Five Stars The size was perfect for what I needed. Love it [4.0/5] Small, but nice product Nice product, smaller than I thought, but fits quite a bit. Square shape packs easily. Not made of a very thick material but seems well made. [5.0/5] Good :) very easy to carry around and holds my stuff well. [4.0/5] Wish it was just about an inch larger, but over all a good travel bag! This travel bag would have received a 5 star rating if it would have been just about an inch larger. I use several make up brushes, and unfortunately they don't fit very well in this bag when I have my other make up in it. I don't wear a ton of makeup, but I do like my brushes. I use them to smooth out the eye shadow, and to apply my liner. As you can see in the picture, the brush is as long as the bag. When it is in the bag with my other make up, the bristles on the brush tend to get bent, and that can make applying my liner a bit more difficult. If I leave the brushes in their protective bag, then they don't fit at all in the travel bag. Other than the brush size issue, this is a good travel bag. [5.0/5] Perfect little carry all Perfect little carry all. I use it everyday in my regular purse but can take it out if I don't want my big bag. [5.0/5] My daughter love the bag but it only allow a few pieces ... I brought the makeup bag for my daughter. My daughter love the bag but it only allow a few pieces of her make up in the bag. Brushes can not fit in the bag but other than that she love the bag! [5.0/5] Perfect shower caddy! I like this bag for my gym bag. It fits six of the airplane regulation size silicon bottles. Also, on the inside, there are two mesh pockets. These are great for all my other little toiletries, like tweezers, makeup etc. The back feels well constructed, and the zipper slides real nice. I like the tab at the end of the zipper making it really easy to find and zip and unzip. Feels good between your fingers without having to manage the end of the small zipper. But handl is real nice. It goes right onto the hook at the gym shower. The handle is also big enough to get a good grip on it and not have to manage it with a couple of fingers. I like the fact that you can fits your whole shower caddy in it. It's very compact, yet substantial enough to carry everything that you need in a shower. I received this product at a discounted rate in exchange for my honest and unbiased review. Like you, I rely reviews to make my purchases. I hope this one helps! [5.0/5] Five Stars Very Nice really comfortable for travel. [5.0/5] Cool functional little bag does the trick! I paid a discounted price for this product in order to review it on Amazon. I'm being very honest in my review, and I tend to be very critical about products. Here is what I thought about it:

I really liked this bag. The first thing I noticed that was different from other cosmetic bags was it's size and shape-I liked it! Usually cosmetic bags are long and awkward but I loved the little compact square simple shape of this one. I feel like with the longer ones all your stuff gets mixed together and ends up a mess so this seemed like the perfect size. It fit a surprisingly lot of cosmetics in there. I actually thought there were a lot of seemingly minor but really nice features on this little bag. Here are some of the features that, while small, felt like they really made a difference:

1) I LOVE the little mesh on the each side of the bag. Instead of being one massive empty container, the mesh helped me separate some products from others. For example, I have a little tub of cream that always gets lost in my regular cosmetic bag. I'm sure you have all been through it--where you are digging and digging just to find something small sunken down at the bottom of your bag. Here, I simply stuck it on the side and could easily grab it. Same with thin pencil liners--they are impossible to find in other bags but here I stuck mine in the mesh and presto! I could grab them easily. I also kept a pack of mini tissues in the mesh so that they wouldn't touch my make up which on occasion will leak.

2) I love that the zipper had a large tag-like thing at the end so you could easily grab it. My other bags end up getting weighed down by make-up and then it's hard to get a good grip on the dinky little zippers that other bags include. Plus, this one seems like it is not going to fall off easily.

3) The zipper seems very solid and smooth. I hate when bags are nice and then the zipper is cheap. Not so here.

4) The size is awesome and perfect for me--as I mentioned above. I love the cute boxy shape.

5) The logo (and zipper hold, mentioned above) seem solidly sewn in, not cheaply and loosely attached like other bags I have bought.

The only thing that I feel could have been an improvement are: I would have loved for the strap to be a velcro strap so it could hook onto other bags or items easily. And I'm not in love with the colors of the logo. But neither of these are a big deal and by far, the functionality of the bag outweighed these desired improvements.

I think if you are looking for a simple, functional cosmetic bag that holds a decent amount of stuff, this will be fine for you! I hope my description is helpful! I thought this product was really cute.

I posted some pictures below to give you a sense of the size and about how much can fit in the bag (I could fit more cosmetics but I wanted you to see the cool mesh on the sides so I didn't pack it to the gills. I also included a picture of the zipper.
Thanks for reading! (: [4.0/5] Perfect for my sons toiletries Perfect for my sons toiletries for his camping trips [5.0/5] Excellent medium sized travel bag! This is a perfect little travel bag! I was very pleasantly surprised with this bag. I loved the quality of the fabric. It is indeed waterproof. I ran some water from the faucet on the outside of the bag and no water got inside. So, that is great. It is very heavy duty fabric, not easily damaged, ripped or torn I believe. I am very happy with the size. I know some reviewers felt it was "small", to small for brushes or full size products, which is true. However, I never put my hairbrushes and makeup in the same bag, and when I travel I do not take full size bottles. I felt that it was generously sized. It has a good sized depth. Also I was thrilled with the mesh pockets on the inside to keep things organized. The loop on the outside is quite wide, making it easy to carry with your hand or readily available to be hooked on a backpack or another piece of luggage. But, the square size and edges make it a perfect fit for packing in luggage. I have found it to be a very convenient makeup bag.

I did recieve this product at a discounted rate in exchange for my honest and unbiased review. All opinions expressed here are my own.

Our family travels a lot. And our kids are involved in a lot of activities. We have multiple bags packed for travel sports that stay packed during the season. This bag is durable and I know it can be used a lot and take a beating while still looking good. The surface is wipeable, I tested it, and I would feel comfortable putting it through my washing machine as well. I have done this with almost all of my makeup bags and they turn out great.

Definitely 5 Stars!! [5.0/5] Luv luv luv!! Received item expeditiously. I read the reviews and based on that I took the leap of faith and ordered. It is absolutely perfect for my needs. Love everything about it and the price was spot on!! Thank you. [5.0/5] Bag looks pretty good too I needed a certain size bag to put in my center console of my car and this fit exactly what I needed. Bag looks pretty good too, nice colors on it. I like that it has pouches inside so I can separate my stuff. [5.0/5] Cute and useful little bag for my travel size toiletries [[VIDEOID:63682a526c91bd3be8b57eb6c5e78631]] This one is a really cute and well made little makeup bag with a very useful handle. I love this bag! It perfectly holds all my travel size bottles (shampoo, conditioner, deodorant, hair spray, makeup remover, face cleanser, toothpaste - all in small sizes), folding toothbrush, small bath sponge, mascara, balm etc. Actually it can cover the exact quantity of my toiletry items that I need during my trip. This is a pretty smart and stylish stuff for traveling, that’s why it’s great for me! But if you want a general size bag for all your general size makeup and toiletries, probably you should try to find another bag!

I made a 5 min video and tried to upload it here but I can’t do this, because of the file’s size! For this once I made another one, very short video about this product. It’s not so helpful and showy like my previous one, just a few words, but maybe it still can help somebody to make the right choice. [4.0/5] fantastic fantastic

response:
This small, compact travel/makeup bag receives mostly positive reviews. Customers love its unique square shape, cute design, and the mesh pockets inside that help keep items organized. The zipper is praised for being smooth and easy to use, and the handle is appreciated for its convenience. The bag is also noted for being waterproof and durable.

The main complaint across several reviews is the size. While many find it perfect for travel-size toiletries and everyday essentials, some wish it were slightly larger, particularly because makeup brushes either don't fit or get bent when packed inside. A few reviewers also noted the material is not very thick, though it still appears well made.

Overall, customers recommend it as a handy, stylish bag for travel toiletries, gym use, or as an everyday organizer inside a larger purse, as long as you don't need to carry full-size products or long makeup brushes.
